name: Velvet Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Sugar (3/4 cup for pudding, 1/2 cup for egg whites)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs and beat the yolks well.
2. Mix the beaten yolks with milk in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, combine 3/4 cup sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
4. Gradually add the milk and egg yolk mixture to the sugar mixture.
5. Cook over a double boiler until thick, stirring often.
6. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
7. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites and 1/4 cup sugar until stiff peaks form.
8. Spread the pudding mixture into a baking dish.
9. Cover with beaten egg whites.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the desired level of browning is achieved.
Serves 10. The pudding is also delicious if the egg whites are folded in while it is hot.
